allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in r.items\(\) if k not in \('hrv','heart_rate','movement_30_sec','readiness','sleep_phase_5_min','time_in_bed'\)}, indent=2\)\) for r in d['data']]")
